# Correctover

> We are the runtime security layer for the MCP ecosystem.

Correctover is the first MCP server purpose-built for agent fault diagnosis and self-healing. It monitors tool calls across LLM providers, detects failures in real-time, and auto-repairs them using a knowledge base of 215 fault patterns and 19 CVEs — all at 22μs P50 latency.

## What It Does

- **Fault Diagnosis**: Instantly diagnose why your agent's tool call failed — timeout, auth, schema, rate limit, provider down
- **Auto Self-Healing**: 97.4% of detected faults are automatically repaired with zero human intervention
- **Multi-Provider Failover**: Seamlessly failover across 9+ LLM providers when one goes down
- **Fault Pattern Matching**: Match errors against 215 known fault patterns from 80,000+ empirical data points
- **Runtime Security**: Intercept RCE, SSRF, and cloud credential hijacking attempts at the MCP layer
- **CCS Compliance**: Implement the Conformance Conformance Standard for MCP runtime security

## Key Metrics

- 215 cataloged fault patterns across 32 MCP frameworks
- 19 CVEs documented
- 97.4% auto self-heal rate
- 22μs P50 latency overhead
- 80,000+ empirical data points
- 9+ LLM providers supported (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Groq, Qwen, GLM, SiliconFlow, Together, Moonshot)

## Tools (MCP Server)

- `scan` — Run 6-dimension security scan on MCP tool calls
- `diagnose` — Diagnose why a tool call failed with root cause analysis
- `fault_library` — Browse 215 cataloged fault patterns
- `recovery` — Get auto-repair suggestions for detected faults
- `providers` — View supported LLM providers and their status
- `stats` — Session metrics: calls, validation rate, failover count

## Pricing

- Free: 50 calls/day, no credit card
- Starter: $49/month (5,000 calls)
- Pro: $199/month (25,000 calls)
- Team: $499/month (100,000 calls)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing

## Install

### Smithery (hosted, no install needed)
Connect via Smithery: https://smithery.ai/servers/correctover/correctover

### npm
```
npx -y correctover-mcp-server
```

### PyPI
```
pip install correctover
```

- Website: https://correctover.com

- Whitepaper (DOI): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21405206
- CCS Standard: https://correctover.com/docs/ccs-standard.html

## FAQ

### What is Correctover?
Correctover is the runtime security layer for the MCP (Model Context Protocol) ecosystem. It validates LLM outputs in real-time, blocks injection attacks, prevents credential hijacking, and auto-recovers from failures at 22μs P50 latency.

### How does it differ from LiteLLM or Portkey?
LiteLLM and Portkey are upstream routing/proxy layers. Correctover sits at the runtime security layer — it validates outputs, diagnoses faults, and auto-repairs them. We are complementary, not competing.

### What is CCS?
CCS (Conformance Conformance Standard) is the neutral, open industry standard for MCP runtime security conformance. Correctover is the reference implementation.

### Is it open source?
The core engine is open source under Apache 2.0. Enterprise features include private deployment, custom fault DB, and SLA.

### What fault patterns does it detect?
215 patterns across 19 categories including: tool call timeouts, auth errors, schema violations, rate limits, provider outages, RCE attempts, SSRF attacks, credential hijacking, and more.
